# Psalms 64

## Verses (10)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O God, let the voice of my grief come to your ear: keep my life from the fear of those who are against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Keep me safe from the secret purpose of wrongdoers; from the band of the workers of evil; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Who make their tongues sharp like a sword, and whose arrows are pointed, even bitter words; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | So that in secret they may let loose their arrows at the upright, suddenly and unseen. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | They make themselves strong in an evil purpose; they make holes for secret nets; they say, Who will see it, | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Or make discovery of our secret purpose? The design is framed with care; and the inner thought of a man, and his heart, is deep. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | But God sends out an arrow against them; suddenly they are wounded. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The evil of their tongues is the cause of their fall; all those who see them are shaking their heads at them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | And in fear men make public the works of God; and giving thought to his acts they get wisdom. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | The upright will be glad in the Lord and have hope in him; and all the lovers of righteousness will give him glory. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
